query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS best_moves (
  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  puzzle_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  fen TEXT NOT NULL,
  best_move VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  all_moves TEXT NOT NULL,
  centipawn_eval INT DEFAULT NULL,
  centipawn_loss INT DEFAULT NULL,
  rating INT NOT NULL,
  difficulty INT DEFAULT NULL,
  opening_name VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  opening_variation VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  eco_code VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT NULL,
  themes TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  color VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT NULL,
  is_best_quality BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uk_puzzle (puzzle_id),
  INDEX idx_bm_rating (rating),
  INDEX idx_bm_opening (opening_name),
  INDEX idx_bm_difficulty (difficulty),
  INDEX idx_bm_quality (is_best_quality),
  INDEX idx_bm_cp_loss (centipawn_loss)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS best_moves (
  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  puzzle_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  fen TEXT NOT NULL,
  best_move VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  all_moves TEXT NOT NULL,
  centipawn_eval INT DEFAULT NULL,
  centipawn_loss INT DEFAULT NULL,
  rating INT NOT NULL,
  difficulty INT DEFAULT NULL,
  opening_name VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  opening_variation VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  eco_code VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT NULL,
  themes TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  color VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT NULL,
  is_best_quality BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uk_puzzle (puzzle_id),
  INDEX idx_bm_rating (rating),
  INDEX idx_bm_opening (opening_name),
  INDEX idx_bm_difficulty (difficulty),
  INDEX idx_bm_quality (is_best_quality),
  INDEX idx_bm_cp_loss (centipawn_loss)
);
